mission.title: kubeflow: Support theia or microsoft visual studio code
mission.description: Support theia or microsoft visual studio code. This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify kubeflow feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=kubeflow
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Support theia or microsoft visual studio code

steps.title: Check current Pod configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubeflow resources:
```bash
kubectl get pod -A
kubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>
```
It is often useful to have a proper IDE when developing models. For example, even when using Jupyter, users may choose to organize python code into modules. They might also want to create additional f

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support theia or microsoft visual studio code
steps.description:
Related to the discussion https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/3362 and https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/2208.

This PR adds experimental R-Studio images based of off the popular images from the [rocker project](https://www.rocker-project.org/). The way this image works is by having an embedded instance of Apache2 rewrite the url base from the `NB_PREFIX` environment variable. Due to RStudio having hardcoded redirects to `/auth-sign-in` and `/auth-sign-out` for loading the auth

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Confirm Support theia or microsoft visual studio code is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: Related to the discussion https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/3362 and https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/2208.

This PR adds experimental R-Studio images based of off the popular images from the [rocker project](https://www.rocker-project.org/). The way this image works is by having an embedded instance of Apache2 rewrite the url base from the `NB_PREFIX` environment variable. Du. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubeflow installed or the issue environment reproducible.
